ValidationRule.description: Project has an Invoice and/or an ILV in Status Draft.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, OR( ProjectName__r.ValCountHasInvoiceDraft__c >0, ProjectName__r.ValCountHasILVDraft__c >0 ), OR( ISCHANGED(PackageSuperior__c), ISCHANGED(ProjectName__c), ISCHANGED(PackageSubType__c), ISCHANGED(PackageRateHour__c), ISCHANGED(PackageSortNr__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Package is locked due to an Invoice or ILV in Status ""Draft"". Please complete Invoice first. (PA017)
